scripts.devbuild:empty: cd envs/empty && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-empty:dev --target development .
scripts.devbuild:node: cd envs/nodejs && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-node:dev --target development .
scripts.devbuild:python: cd envs/python && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-python:dev --target development .
scripts.devbuild:golang: cd envs/go && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-go:dev --target development .
scripts.devbuild:nest: cd envs/nestjs && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-nest:dev --target development .
scripts.devbuild:php: cd envs/php && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-php:dev --target development .
scripts.devbuild:rust: cd envs/rust && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-rust:dev --target development .
scripts.devbuild:deno: cd envs/deno && docker build --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=hide-env-base:dev -t hide-env-deno:dev --target development .
scripts.build:empty: cd envs/empty && docker build -t hide-env-empty --target production .
scripts.build:node: cd envs/nodejs && docker build -t hide-env-node --target production .
scripts.build:python: cd envs/python && docker build -t hide-env-python --target production .
scripts.build:golang: cd envs/go && docker build -t hide-env-go --target production .
scripts.build:nest: cd envs/nestjs && docker build -t hide-env-nest --target production .
scripts.build:php: cd envs/php && docker build -t hide-env-php --target production .
scripts.build:rust: cd envs/rust && docker build -t hide-env-rust --target production .
scripts.build:deno: cd envs/deno && docker build -t hide-env-deno --target production .
